name: Synaptic Integration
short_description: Summation and interaction of excitatory and inhibitory synaptic inputs.
detailed_description: Synaptic integration covers how excitatory (AMPA) and inhibitory (GABA) inputs combine across space and time to drive the post-synaptic neuron. In this project the category tags work on AMPA/GABA input density, EPSP and IPSP amplitude and kinetics, and the spatiotemporal structure of wave stimuli used to probe directional tuning.
